title: sorghum bicolor var. technicum
intro: Sorghum bicolor var. technicum, also known as broomcorn sorghum, is a subspecies of the sorghum bicolor plant, a type of grass native to Africa and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is also rich in nutrients and has been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, sorghum bicolor var. technicum can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
